overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime exploration of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The clip transitions from a dense urban street featuring the 'Jacked and Coke' building to an abandoned amusement park area dominated by a massive pink neon Ferris wheel, ending at a campfire beneath the structure.

agents.ego_description: walking across a wet neon-lit crosswalk toward the Jacked and Coke building, observing the surrounding cyberpunk architecture

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving through the intersection
person walking across the street in the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building with large pink neon 'Jacked and Coke' signage on the facade
yellow striped pedestrian crossing with wet reflective surface
various colorful neon advertisements and building lights
tall glass and steel structures with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street at night, approaching the iconic Jacked and Coke building. The wet crosswalk reflects vibrant pink and blue neon lights as a blue sports car drives through the intersection and pedestrians cross nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon of skyscrapers with overhead neon billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers and neon billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering glass skyscrapers and neon advertisements overhead, taking in the vertical cityscape

entered.detail: tall curved glass tower with multiple illuminated floors and neon accents
large glowing advertisements mounted on the sides of buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers covered in neon billboards, creating a canyon-like effect between the buildings. The Jacked and Coke building recedes to the left as the perspective shifts to emphasize the vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned amusement park approach with massive Ferris wheel

events.description: hard cut to new location featuring a large pink neon Ferris wheel and palm trees
white van drives past from left to right across the frame

agents.ego_description: driving along a street toward a massive illuminated Ferris wheel in an abandoned urban area

notable_agents.action: white van driving past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: massive Ferris wheel structure illuminated with bright pink neon lights
single-story commercial building with illuminated signage
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
structure with visible flames and smoke in the distance

segments.scene_description: A sudden transition to a more open area dominated by a massive pink neon Ferris wheel on the left. The camera moves along a wet street past a gas station and palm trees, with a white van driving by and a burning building visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned amusement park under the Ferris wheel with campfire

events.description: camera slows and turns right, moving from driving to walking under the Ferris wheel
approaching a campfire with a person standing under a neon-lit umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking slowly under the massive Ferris wheel structure toward a campfire, navigating through debris

notable_agents.action: person standing by a campfire under a red umbrella with vertical neon lighting

entered.detail: burning barrel fire providing warm orange light
red umbrella with bright pink neon light tube along the pole
corrugated metal barrier with red and white stripes
scattered trash and abandoned items covering the ground

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath the massive Ferris wheel, the camera navigates through debris and abandoned structures. The Ferris wheel now looms directly overhead as the scene opens to a campfire with a person standing under a neon-lit red umbrella, creating an intimate atmosphere beneath the towering pink illuminated wheel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban center that gradually transitions into a desolate, neon-lit amusement area. It begins by navigating a wet city street reflecting vibrant pink and blue lights, passing a blue sports car and pedestrians as it approaches the Jacked and Coke building. The perspective then tilts upward to emphasize the vertical scale of towering glass skyscrapers and neon billboards before the environment opens up into a wider district. As the camera moves past a gas station and palm trees, a massive pink neon Ferris wheel emerges on the left against a backdrop featuring a burning building. The scene finally shifts beneath the looming structure, weaving through debris and abandoned ruins to arrive at a campfire where a person stands under a red neon umbrella.
